items.title: Eastern heat threatens FIFA World Cup players and fans
items.summary: Forecasters say the hottest World Cup tournament match so far this year could hit Saturday afternoon, during the knockout round game between France and Paraguay in Philadelphia
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Real Madrid have 'no intention' of signing Fernandez
items.summary: Real Madrid say they have "no intention" of trying to sign Enzo Fernandez from Chelsea this summer.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Eala's historic Wimbledon run thrills boxing-obsessed Philippines
items.summary: The 21-year-old has become the first Filipino to reach the third round of a Grand Slam in the Open era.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
